en: Belarus. Opened and shot domestic. Murder. Not worth my time.

ko: 뭐 좀 먹을 거 있어? 배고파.

en: It's a head. A severed head.
ko: 잘린 머리. 나는 차만 마실게, 고마워.

en: Just tea for me, thanks. No, there's a head in the fridge. Yes.
ko: 아니, 냉장고에 머리가 있어. 맞아. 피투성이 머리!

en: A bloody head. Where else was I supposed to put it? You don't mind, do you?
Got it from Bart's morgue. I'm measuring the coagulation of saliva after death.
So you've written up the taxi driver case? Yes.
ko: 택시 기사 사건을 정리한 것 같네.

en: Well, you know, pink lady, pink case, pink phone.
ko: 음, 핑크색 여자, 핑크색 사건, 핑크색 전화.

en: There was a lot of pink. Did you like it?
Um, no. Why not? I thought you'd be flattered.
ko: 아니. 왜? 네가 기분 좋을 줄 알았는데.

en: Sherlock sees through everything and everyone in seconds.
ko: 셜록은 모든 것을, 모든 사람을 몇 초 만에 꿰뚫어 봐.
